title: Channel Entry
description: Faceless-mode channel entry. Locks style (playbook), voice, and format (media profile) for the existing pipeline. Does NOT name a model or pin a gateway — the existing scorer chooses generation models (switch OFF). `style_prompt` and `niche` are conditioning-only (prompt text); request matching uses `match.keywords` only.

match.description: Request-matching config. Matching uses keywords only (dead-simple for this build).

keywords.description: Lowercase phrases; a request matches this channel if it contains any of them.

id.description: Provider-specific voice id passed as the TTS `voice` input.

media_profile.description: Media profile key in lib/media_profiles.py (e.g. youtube_landscape).

style_prompt.description: Conditioning-only. Concatenated into generation prompts; never read in a conditional or routing decision.

niche.description: Conditioning-only descriptor. Flavor text for prompts; never branched on. NOT used for matching.
